exploration_notes: Found all three core Kafka Streams topology abstractions in the kafka repo under streams/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/streams/: (1) Topology (public class, line 60) — represents the DAG of processing nodes. (2) StreamsBuilder (public class, line 65) — the high-level DSL for building topologies. (3) KafkaStreams (public class implementing AutoCloseable, line 161) — the runtime that executes a topology. All are concrete classes (not interfaces or abstract classes).
